title: Activity Register — Awareness Overview
description: AR-REPORT-04 awareness overview (top operations + top external dependencies + active anomalies) carrying the AR-REPORT-03 explainable avg+Nσ volume-anomaly panel. ClickHouse analytics.events. Byte/anomaly measures filter source='be' AND effect_kind='egress' (AR-FE-03). Tune the anomaly sensitivity with the $sigma / $window dashboard vars.

list.name: sigma
list.label: σ multiplier
list.description: Standard-deviation multiplier for the anomaly threshold (baseline_avg + $sigma * stddevPop). Higher = quieter.

list.name: window
list.label: Baseline window (hours)
list.description: Trailing window (hours) over which the per-operation baseline is computed.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS anomalies FROM ( WITH hourly AS (SELECT operation, toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS h, sum(requests) AS req FROM events WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL $window HOUR AND effect_kind = 'egress' AND source = 'be' GROUP BY operation, h), stats AS (SELECT operation, avgIf(req, h < toStartOfHour(now())) AS baseline_avg, stddevPopIf(req, h < toStartOfHour(now())) AS baseline_sd, anyIf(req, h = toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR)) AS last_req FROM hourly GROUP BY operation) SELECT operation, last_req > baseline_avg + $sigma * baseline_sd AS is_anomaly FROM stats WHERE baseline_avg > 0 ) WHERE is_anomaly
SELECT operation, sum(requests) AS requests, round(avg(duration_ms), 1) AS avg_ms FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND operation != '' GROUP BY operation ORDER BY requests DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT target AS dependency, sum(requests) AS requests, sum(bytes_out + bytes_in) AS bytes FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND effect_kind = 'egress' AND source = 'be' GROUP BY target ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 10

WITH hourly AS (SELECT operation, toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS h, sum(requests) AS req FROM events WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL $window HOUR AND effect_kind = 'egress' AND source = 'be' GROUP BY operation, h), stats AS (SELECT operation, avgIf(req, h < toStartOfHour(now())) AS baseline_avg, stddevPopIf(req, h < toStartOfHour(now())) AS baseline_sd, anyIf(req, h = toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR)) AS last_req FROM hourly GROUP BY operation) SELECT operation, last_req, round(baseline_avg, 1) AS baseline_avg, round(baseline_avg + $sigma * baseline_sd, 1) AS threshold, last_req > baseline_avg + $sigma * baseline_sd AS is_anomaly FROM stats WHERE baseline_avg > 0 ORDER BY (last_req - baseline_avg) / nullIf(baseline_sd, 0) DESC
